mapper.select: SELECT message_id, message_type, title, content, is_read, created_at, read_at, link, COALESCE(priority, 0) as priority FROM system_message WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_message ( message_id, user_id, message_type, title, content, related_id, is_read, scheduled_send_time, sent_at, expires_at, priority, link, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{messageType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), #{scheduledSendTime}, #{sentAt}, #{expiresAt}, COALESCE(#{priority}, 0), #{link}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE system_message SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND message_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE system_message SET is_read = 0, read_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND message_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE system_message SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
